name: io.github.rishiatlan/claude-prompt-optimizer
description: Prompt Control Plane — deterministic prompt linting, scoring, policy enforcement & audit. Zero AI calls inside. Freemium.

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable Pro tier via environment variable (alternative to license key)
environmentVariables.name: PROMPT_CONTROL_PLANE_PRO

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity level: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: PROMPT_CONTROL_PLANE_LOG_LEVEL
